welcome_subtitle: The intelligent way to securely log, analyze, and instantly extract clinical metrics from your medical documents using advanced AI.
card1_desc: Add multiple patient profiles to keep clinical histories cleanly and securely separated under one roof.
card2_desc: Simply capture a picture of your lab tests or paste raw text. The AI handles the data extraction instantly.
card3_desc: Monitor your vital trends natively with flexible reporting and secure record tables built directly on SQLite.
metric_description_eosinophils: White blood cells involved in allergy and parasite responses.
metric_description_ast: Aspartate aminotransferase, a liver and muscle enzyme.
metric_description_egfr: Estimated glomerular filtration rate, a summary of kidney filtration function.
metric_description_wbc: Total number of white blood cells in the blood.
metric_description_total_bilirubin: Pigment from red blood cell breakdown used in liver and bile assessment.
metric_description_hematocrit: Percentage of blood volume occupied by red blood cells.
metric_description_mchc: Average hemoglobin concentration inside red blood cells.
metric_description_hemoglobin: Protein in red blood cells that carries oxygen.
metric_description_chloride: Electrolyte that helps maintain acid-base and fluid balance.
metric_description_ldh: Lactate dehydrogenase, an enzyme released when tissues are damaged.
metric_description_creatinine: Waste product used to evaluate kidney function.
metric_description_cea: Carcinoembryonic antigen, a tumor marker often used in follow-up.
metric_description_monocytes: White blood cells that develop into macrophages and help clear debris.
metric_description_sodium: Major electrolyte involved in fluid balance and nerve function.
metric_description_seg_neutrophils: Mature neutrophils, a major infection-fighting white blood cell type.
metric_description_bun: Nitrogen from urea, used as one marker of kidney function and hydration.
metric_description_crp: C-reactive protein, a marker of inflammation.
metric_description_ck: Creatine kinase, an enzyme associated with muscle injury.
metric_description_mcv: Average size of red blood cells.
metric_description_total_protein: Combined concentration of albumin and globulins in blood.
metric_description_calcium: Mineral important for bone, nerve, and muscle function.
metric_description_amylase: Digestive enzyme produced mainly by the pancreas and salivary glands.
metric_description_hdl: High-density lipoprotein cholesterol, often called protective cholesterol.
metric_description_alp: Alkaline phosphatase, an enzyme related to liver and bone activity.
metric_description_ggtp: Gamma-glutamyl transferase, a liver and bile duct enzyme.
metric_description_potassium: Electrolyte essential for heart, nerve, and muscle function.
metric_description_ca19_9: Tumor marker often used in gastrointestinal and pancreatic disease follow-up.
metric_description_uric_acid: Waste product from purine metabolism, associated with gout and kidney stone risk.
metric_description_platelet_count: Number of platelets that support blood clotting.
metric_description_rbc: Number of red blood cells circulating in blood.
metric_description_hba1c: Average blood glucose marker over the past two to three months.
metric_description_ldl: Low-density lipoprotein cholesterol, often used in cardiovascular risk assessment.
metric_description_lymphocytes: White blood cells central to immune defense.
metric_description_blood_glucose: Whole blood or plasma glucose concentration used for glycemic assessment.
metric_description_serum_glucose: Glucose concentration measured specifically in serum rather than whole blood or plasma.
metric_description_mch: Average hemoglobin amount in each red blood cell.
metric_description_band_neutrophils: Immature neutrophils that may increase during acute inflammation or infection.
metric_description_cholinesterase: Enzyme often used as a liver synthetic function marker.
metric_description_basophils: White blood cells involved in allergic and inflammatory responses.
metric_description_albumin_calculated: Calculated albumin concentration derived from protein fractionation.
metric_description_alpha1_globulin: Protein fraction that includes several acute-phase proteins.
metric_description_beta2_globulin: Protein fraction within the beta globulin region on electrophoresis.
metric_description_alpha2_globulin: Protein fraction containing proteins such as haptoglobin and alpha2-macroglobulin.
metric_description_beta1_globulin: Protein fraction within the beta1 region on electrophoresis.
metric_description_albumin_fraction: Percentage of total protein represented by albumin.
metric_description_ag_ratio: Albumin-to-globulin ratio, summarizing the balance of major serum proteins.
metric_description_neutrophils: White blood cells that provide fast response to bacterial infection.
metric_description_atypical_lymphocytes: Reactive lymphocytes that can appear during infections or immune activation.
metric_description_ldl_hdl_ratio: Ratio comparing LDL cholesterol to HDL cholesterol.
metric_description_triglycerides: Blood fats used in energy storage and metabolic risk assessment.
metric_description_acth: Adrenocorticotropic hormone that stimulates cortisol production in the adrenal glands.
metric_description_ckd_stage: Chronic kidney disease stage classification based on kidney function and related findings.
metric_description_cortisol: Adrenal steroid hormone involved in stress response, metabolism, and inflammation control.
metric_description_d_dimer: Fibrin degradation marker used when evaluating clot formation and breakdown.
metric_description_fib_4_index: Noninvasive liver fibrosis index derived from age, AST, ALT, and platelet count.
metric_description_free_t3: Unbound triiodothyronine level used in thyroid function assessment.
metric_description_free_t4: Unbound thyroxine level used in thyroid function assessment.
metric_description_fsh: Follicle-stimulating hormone involved in reproductive endocrine function.
metric_description_growth_hormone: Pituitary hormone that supports growth, metabolism, and tissue repair.
metric_description_igf_1: Insulin-like growth factor 1, a hormone related to growth hormone activity.
metric_description_lh: Luteinizing hormone involved in reproductive endocrine signaling.
metric_description_lymphocyte_count: Absolute number of lymphocytes in the blood.
metric_description_metamyelocytes: Immature granulocyte precursors that may appear during marrow stimulation or severe infection.
metric_description_myelocytes: Immature granulocyte precursors normally found in bone marrow.
metric_description_neutrophil_count: Absolute number of neutrophils in the blood.
metric_description_nitrite: Urine nitrite test often used to screen for certain urinary tract infections.
metric_description_occult_blood: Hidden blood detected by screening, often in urine or stool testing.
metric_description_prolactin: Pituitary hormone related to lactation and reproductive endocrine regulation.
metric_description_testosterone: Sex hormone involved in reproductive function, muscle mass, and secondary sex characteristics.
metric_description_total_cholesterol: Total cholesterol concentration in blood, combining major cholesterol fractions.
metric_description_tsh: Thyroid-stimulating hormone used in thyroid function evaluation.
metric_description_urine_bilirubin: Urine bilirubin test used in liver and biliary assessment.
metric_description_urine_glucose: Urine glucose test used in glycemic and renal screening.
metric_description_urine_ketones: Urine ketone test reflecting fat metabolism and ketone production.
metric_description_urine_protein: Urine protein test used in kidney and urinary tract assessment.
metric_description_urine_specific_gravit: Measure of urine concentration relative to water.
metric_description_urine_white_blood_cel: Urinary white blood cell finding used in infection or inflammation assessment.
metric_description_urobilinogen: Urine urobilinogen marker related to bilirubin metabolism and liver function.
custom_metric_description: Custom metric without a predefined catalog description yet.
review_extracted_subtitle: Please verify the extracted values before saving.
enter_testing_facility: Enter the testing facility if known
parsed_label_help: English parsed labels are used for grouping and trend comparison across facilities.
auto_detected_facility: Auto-detected from the document, or enter manually
assessed_records_subtitle: Grouped by report so you can expand a check, review its values, and edit its metadata in place.
reference_range_hint: Shaded directly in the chart when a bounded range exists
no_plot_description: This chart appears once the patient has at least one numeric metric, such as glucose, cholesterol, or weight, across one or more dated records.
no_records_for_patient: No records found for this patient.
no_records_hint: Upload a test result to automatically populate records!
report_notes_placeholder: Add a note or comment for this report
delete_records_confirm_one: Are you sure you want to delete {count} record?
delete_records_confirm_other: Are you sure you want to delete {count} records?
delete_report_confirm_one: Delete this report and its {count} associated record?
delete_report_confirm_other: Delete this report and its {count} associated records?
delete_record_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this record?
danger_description: You are about to permanently delete {name}'s profile and destroy their entire clinical history. This action cannot be undone.
backup_description: Download a copy of the clinical records before destruction.
